_meta.artifact_type: Gate-Owner reconciliation of the two Wave 4 pre-QA criteria files (stricter-wins)
_meta.author: reset-consolidation-gate session (Gate Owner, coordination only)
_meta.role: REVIEW-ONLY. New file only. ZERO writes to either QA file, the manifest, ready file, LEDGER, PROGRESS, ownership_tier, entity_classification, ownership_status, or the DB.
_meta.instruction_basis: User: 'If your internal QA_preQA_criteria agent later returns a second criteria file, compare it against the actual QA file above and enforce the stricter rule in any conflict. Do not overwrite prior QA files.'

authoritative_per_user.status: AUTHORITATIVE gate of record (user-designated). NOT overwritten.

secondary_cross_check.status: SECONDARY cross-check (distinct filename; the file itself claims to 'supersede' but the USER designation governs: it is a cross-check). NOT overwritten.

overall_finding: NO SUBSTANTIVE CONTRADICTION. Both files lock the same tier model (DSO=STRUCTURE, pe_backed orthogonal), the same AB1-AB12, the same protected-network set, the same Webster held-set, the same Fleet-B leads-stay-leads rule, and the same FROZEN consolidation posture. The secondary file is a strictly more GRANULAR elaboration of the authoritative bar. Enforced rule = the UNION of both, with stricter-wins on any conflict. The authoritative pre_criteria file remains the named gate of record.

conflicts_found_and_resolved.where: secondary preQA file _meta.consolidation_frozen_invariants.db_md5_baseline = '0dec26135bb4d6ee490dc26cfe892ca6' (dc26) and zero_db_write_discipline.rule repeats dc26; BUT its own GO-12 says dc16.
conflicts_found_and_resolved.authoritative_value: 0dec26135bb4d6ee490dc16cfe892ca6 (dc16) — matches RE-QA #5 zero_db_writes block and pre_criteria.
conflicts_found_and_resolved.resolution: EMPIRICAL. Current data/dental_pe_tracker.db md5 computed live = 0dec26135bb4d6ee490dc16cfe892ca6 (dc16). The secondary file's dc26 is a transcription typo (2 of 3 occurrences). ENFORCED BASELINE md5 = 0dec26135bb4d6ee490dc16cfe892ca6. Neither QA file edited; the typo is recorded here only.

stricter_elements_adopted_from_secondary.effect: A practice-name/brand collision with no Wave-4 resolution HOLDS in conflicts/needs_more_evidence — never promote NOR refute on the name collision alone.

Brand word in the name as the ONLY DSO evidence => needs_more_evidence, backfill_lane='locator_exact', missing_evidence_type='exact_address_match_on_brand_locator'. (This is exactly the Wave-3 13-row demotion failure mode.)
A Fleet B lead is NOT merge-eligible merely for being in the 158 hard-signal subset; it needs a Phase-C transcribed durable artifact AND HB1-HB9 + AB1-AB12.
Wave-4 agents may NOT retroactively assert web_verified=true for a prior wave's output that lacked a transcribed URL. The URL transcription must occur in Wave 4 itself. (Tightens AB3.)
Every merge-eligible row must carry searches_executed (int) + search_queries (list) actually run, plus 'preserved' verbatim sidecar metadata. Promotion without provenance counts is rejected.
still_insufficient rows must carry evidence_urls: [] (empty list, never null) + a named missing_evidence_type.

Only 115/694 needs_verification leads carry ANY on-disk URL/brand/EIN. Any lead claimed 'hard-signal' WITHOUT a transcribed artifact is reclassified to the general needs_verification pool. (Corroborates this session's own AB12 reconciliation: 0/158 carry a transcribed URL today.)

Adopt the secondary's merge_eligibility_decision_tree (step1 scope -> step12 sidecar) as the operative per-row normalization order, since it is a superset of the authoritative merge_eligibility_decision_rule.

authoritative_only_elements_retained: enforceable_gate_owner_checklist (14 items) from pre_criteria is retained in addition to the secondary's GO-1..GO-13 (union of both checklists applies).
per_input_merge_gates and output_contract_for_main_ao_and_fleet_b from pre_criteria remain binding on returned Lane 1/2/3 files.
net_enforced_bar: AB1-AB12 (authoritative merge_test wording) + HB1-HB10 + AH1-AH7 + the 12-step decision tree + the union of both gate-owner checklists. Default disposition for any failing/ambiguous row = needs_more_evidence (named backfill_lane / missing_evidence_type) or undetermined. NEVER ready, NEVER defaulted true_independent, NO partial credit. Enforced baseline DB md5 = 0dec26135bb4d6ee490dc16cfe892ca6.

consolidate_authorization.note: FROZEN until the user's explicit 'consolidate approved manifest'. This reconciliation merges nothing and authorizes nothing.
